reasoning: Pierre-Yves Bournazel is a relatively minor figure compared to other potential and declared candidates for the 2026 Paris mayoral election, such as Rachida Dati (LR/Macronists), Gabriel Attal (Renaissance), Anne Hidalgo (PS), and Emmanuel Grégoire (PS). While he has expressed interest in running, his political weight is much lower, having lost his parliamentary seat and belonging to the Horizons faction which usually allies with a larger coalition that is currently leaning towards Dati or Attal for the center-right ticket. His path to a standalone victory is exceedingly narrow, rendering his chances of winning the mayoralty very low.
